item.title: Welcome to My New Research Website
item.description:
Welcome to my updated research website! I’m Sen He, an Assistant Professor in the Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering at the University of Arizona.

This site serves as a central hub for my research activities, publications, teaching, and information for prospective students. I’ll be posting updates here about new publications, project milestones, and opportunities in my lab.

Current highlights:

  • Our paper on using LLMs for VR exploration testing has been published in Automated Software Engineering.
  • PerfOrch, our multi-agent LLM orchestration framework, has been submitted to TOSEM.
  • I’m teaching SFWE 409/509 Cloud Computing Principles this spring.

If you’re interested in my research or considering graduate studies at the University of Arizona, please don’t hesitate to .
